channel.title: Brazil Elections 2026
channel.description: Real-time monitoring of the 2026 Brazilian presidential elections.

item.title: Deputado lança livro que debate o atraso brasileiro
item.description: Deputado lança livro que debate o atraso brasileiro

item.title: Missão Apoio
item.description: Rede decided to maintain its federation with PSOL, going against internal pressures to approach PT. The decision reinforces the existing strategic alliance, despite defense by figures like Guilherme Boulos for a union with PT.

item.title: Notícias - União Brasil
item.description: The União Brasil party shares updates on its recent activities, including receiving campaign financing funds and influencer Pablo Marçal joining the party, which he called a 'locomotive'. The party also highlights government actions by its allies, such as job creation in Mato Grosso and social initiatives in various cities.

item.title: Notícias - PL 22
item.description: The Liberal Party highlights the parliamentary work of its members, including Senator Marcos Pontes warning about crises in strategic areas, Deputy Colonel Fernanda advancing projects to combat violence against women, and Deputy Soraya Santos working on educational and social protection initiatives. The party also promotes events and initiatives related to road safety, health, and political campaigns.

item.title: Flávio vai a Santa Catarina para ‘riscar chão’ por Carlos Bolsonaro, em meio a disputa acirrada pelo Senado
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro will travel to Santa Catarina to support his brother Carlos Bolsonaro's Senate campaign amid a tight race where three candidates are technically tied. The strategy is to link PL candidates to the Bolsonaro family project and reinforce the party's 'pure-blood' ticket, sidelining the PP candidate. Flávio will participate in a motorcycle rally and meetings with leaders and productive sectors.

item.title: Aliados pregam cautela apesar de avanço de Flávio Bolsonaro nas pesquisas
item.description: Allies of Flávio Bolsonaro celebrate his rise in 2026 polls but urge caution and humility. The senator has expanded his political presence and engaged with various political forces, strengthening his position in the center-right.

item.title: Novo líder supremo iraniano divulgará sua primeira mensagem ’em breve’
item.description: Iran's new Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, announced he will soon release his first official message. The message will address topics related to his late father, former Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, and discuss responsibilities of the people, Armed Forces, and regional countries toward enemies.

item.title: Juiz ordena pausa na construção de centro de detenção para imigrantes nos EUA
item.description: A federal judge in the US temporarily halted construction of an immigrant detention center in Maryland following a state lawsuit alleging inadequate environmental analysis and lack of public consultation. The federal government has already invested over $100 million to convert a warehouse for detention of up to 1,500 people.

item.title: A acirrada disputa entre ACM Neto e Jerônimo pelo governo da Bahia, segundo o Real Time Big Data
item.description: Poll shows tight race for Bahia governor in 2026, with ACM Neto (União Brasil) leading at 44% versus Jerônimo Rodrigues (PT) at 39%, within margin of error. Senate race is led by Rui Costa (PT) at 27% and Jaques Wagner (PT) at 21%, in statistical tie.

item.title: Após STF impor controle mais rigoroso de emendas, Tesouro Nacional toma medida para facilitar rastreio
item.description: The National Treasury published a regulation to facilitate tracking of parliamentary amendments, creating new identification codes. The measure aims to improve transparency and control over resources allocated by deputies and senators to their electoral strongholds. This change comes after the STF vetoed the release of amendments considered irregular and prohibited the so-called 'secret budget'.

item.title: Os favoritos dos baianos ao Senado, segundo a pesquisa Real Time de março
item.description: Real Time Big Data poll shows Rui Costa (PT) and Jaques Wagner (PT) as favorites for the Bahia Senate seat, with 27% and 21% of voting intentions respectively. Angelo Coronel (independent) appears in third place, in a technical tie scenario with Wagner. 2,000 Bahia voters were interviewed with a 2 percentage point margin of error.

item.title: Lula lidera com ampla vantagem entre os eleitores baianos, mostra pesquisa
item.description: Poll shows Lula leading with over 30-point advantage over Flávio Bolsonaro among Bahia voters. In all three scenarios tested, Lula maintains support between 55% and 56%, while Flávio Bolsonaro stays between 22% and 23%. Rejection of Flávio Bolsonaro is high, with 54% of respondents saying they would not vote for him under any circumstances.

item.title: JOTA Principal: Governo Lula busca retomada na comunicação e vê sinais contraditórios dos EUA
item.description: The Lula government struggles with political communication as Flavio Bolsonaro rises in electoral polls. After attempts to regain communication momentum through social media campaigns and advertising, the presidential team seeks to interpret contradictory signals from the US, fearing interference favoring the Bolsonaro candidate.

item.title: Por que Valdemar perdeu a viagem ao tratar de eleição com Eduardo nos EUA
item.description: Por que Valdemar perdeu a viagem ao tratar de eleição com Eduardo nos EUA

item.title: Atualizar o celular deixa ele mais lento? Entenda o que realmente acontece depois de instalar uma nova versão
item.description: The article addresses the common concern about whether updating a phone makes it slower. It explains that on older devices, new operating system versions may cause slowness or increased battery consumption due to additional features and optimizations designed for newer hardware.
